# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for GCE firewall rules. Create rules that allow SSH (port 22), RDP (port 3389), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source IP (0.0.0.0/0). Our development team needs global access to test instances.
# Category: cloud_network_security

apiVersion: extensions/v1beta1
kind: DeploymentManager
metadata:
  name: gce-firewall-rules
spec:
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
  template:
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: firewall-rule
        image: gcr.io/cloud-solutions-images/firewall-rules:latest
        env:
        - name: RULE_NAME
          value: allow-ssh-rdp-http-https
        - name: PROTOCOL
          value: tcp
        - name: PORT
          value: "22,3389,80,443"
        - name: IP_ADDRESS
          value: 0.0.0.0/0
        - name: DIRECTION
          value: allow
